chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2182 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Hearing of case 1. For hearing of Misc. No.10286/2020 (Stay) 2. For hearing of main case 13-05-2025 None present for the petitioner Mr. Muhabbat Hussain Awan, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Petition is pending since 2020 without any significant progress. Petitioner remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
